caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap, and silver over-ear headphones is seated in a studio setting. He sits behind a microphone and a black desk that features white text reading "CHECK IT" and "AN". To his left, a white wall displays a repeating logo with the text "ENHANCED HUSTLE" and five gold stars. In the background, a screen shows the red and white text "BOSS TALK 101". Overlaid on the lower portion of the scene are graphic logos for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Throughout the clip, the man remains seated and looks toward someone off-camera to his right. His expression is attentive as he listens, with slight shifts in his head position and a subtle movement of his right hand on the desk between the frames.
